title: Gynochthodes boninensis
taxonomy: Gynochthodes boninensis is classified within the family Rubiaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Gynochthodes, which is a group of flowering plants. The species G. boninensis is an endemic species found in the Bonin Islands. The classification of G. boninensis is further detailed at the species level, making it a distinct and unique species within its genus and family. The classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic analysis.
